title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Katakuri, Luffy as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're unable to dodge 100 times, you won't be allowed to eat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think that an enemy will care if you're hungry?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's my dinner. Don't pay any mind to it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've got food, I don't want it... Rayleigh said that I can't eat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's all part of the colour of observation, but it seems that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're more proficient in sensing the feelings of living things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you're probably unaware of that, though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then you will definitely be capable of predicting an opponent's movements as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Among the most powerful people in the world, there are those who can see a small glimpse of the future...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What will you do if you meet one of those people? With only two years of training...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to think that you'll be able to reach that level... you'll have a rough time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... I guess it depends on what kind of person they are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their personality?! That's what you care about? I've never considered that aspect.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Waha haha! You're a strange guy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There will be times when you won't be able to just run away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fufufu... you seem to be having some trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: COME!! I'll do my best to make you capable of it!!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
